def calculate_landscaping_cost(services):
    rates = {
        "lawn mowing": 50,
        "tree trimming": 60,
        "flower planting": 40,
        "general cleanup": 30
    }
    total_cost = 0
    for service, hours in services:
        total_cost += hours * rates[service]
    total_cost *= 0.8
    return total_cost

services = [
    ("lawn mowing", 10),
    ("tree trimming", 5),
    ("flower planting", 8),
    ("general cleanup", 12)
]

total_discounted_cost = calculate_landscaping_cost(services)
print(total_discounted_cost)
